samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module. Detects rising edges of data_in and generates a pulse output data_out when a pulse is detected.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Implement pulse detection logic based on the input data_in and generate a pulse output data_out when a pulse is detected. The module uses a finite state machine approach to detect rising edges and manage the pulse output accordingly.</implementation>
</module>
